creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
I do run BOINC 24*7 and hope to be able to do so in the future, and also would like to help the science by maintaining scientific software ports, like BOINC. 
                                                                                                                             
Still this is rather difficult one, and Vladimir Druzenko have much more experience than I do, so he may be better maintainer than me. 
                                                                                                                                       
But if he wouldn't like to take it, I would like and will do my best to take care of it :)
